Part.Source:
&VersaoNF = RetornaVersaoNotas.Udp(VersaoNota.VersaoMDFe)
RetornaConfiguracoesPastas.Call(&EmPCod, &FilCod, &SdtConfiguracoesPasta) ValidaNroMdfe.call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &MDFeCod) For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod WHere FilCod = &FilCod Where MDFeCod = &MDFeCod
&tpEmis = FilTipEmsMdfe.ToString() //NORMAL /CONTINGENCIA
&soNumero = padL(str(MDFeNum), 9, '0') &cMDF = Substr(&soNumero, 2, 8)
&soNumero = udp(RetornaSoNumeros, FilCpj) &Ano = str(year(MDFeDtaEms))
&MDfeChv = substr(trim(str(FilCidUfeIbge)),1,2) + substr(trim(&Ano),3,2) + padl(trim(str(month(MDFeDtaEms),2,0)),2,'0') + PadL(trim(&soNumero), 14, '0') + padL(trim(MDFeModCod), 2, '0') + padL(trim(str(MDFeSer)),3, '0') + padL(trim(str(MDFeNum)), 9, '0') + trim(&tpEmis) + padL(&cMDF, 8, '0')
&DV = RetornaModulo11.Udp(&MDfeChv)
&MDfeChv += trim(&DV) MDFeChv = &MDfeChv
&Parte_arquivo = 'MDFe' + &MDfeChv &Nome_Envio = &SdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaNFenvio.Trim() + '\' +trim(&Parte_arquivo) +'-mdfe.xml'
//Abrir o arquivo XML &Xml.Open(&Nome_Envio)
// Start no Documento &Xml.WriteStartDocument('UTF-8')
&Xml.WriteStartElement('MDFe') &Xml.WriteAttribute('xmlns','http://www.portalfiscal.inf.br/mdfe')
&Xml.WriteStartElement('infMDFe') &Xml.WriteAttribute('versao',&VersaoNF) &Xml.WriteAttribute('Id', &Parte_arquivo)
//IDENTIFICACAO EMITENTE &Xml.WriteStartElement('ide')// <ide> &soNumero = str(FilCidUfeIbge) &Xml.WriteElement('cUF',Substr(trim(&soNumero), 1, 2))// <cUF>35</cUF>
&tpAmb = FilAmbEmsMdfe.ToString() //Em que fase do sistema esta 1 - Produção 2 Homologação &Xml.WriteElement('tpAmb',trim(&tpAmb))// <tpAmb>2</tpAmb>
&Xml.WriteElement('tpEmit',trim(MDFeTipEmt))//<tpEmit>2</tpEmit>
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeVeiCod &MdfeVeiProTip = MdfeVeiProTip
If MdfeVeiProTip <> PropriedadeVeiculo.Proprio &soNumero = udp(RetornaSoNumeros, MDFeVeiProCnpj) EndIf Exit EndFor
// Validações do Tipo de Transportador //# Se modal rodoviário e informado CPF do proprietário do veículo de tração: //A informação do tipo de transportador (tpTransp) deverá ser preenchida com TAC (2). Obrig. 743 Rej.
//Se modal rodoviário e informado CNPJ do proprietário do veículo de tração: //A informação do tipo de transportador (tpTransp) deverá ser preenchida com ETC (1) ou CTC (3). Obrig. 744 Rej.
//# Se modal rodoviário e não informado o grupo proprietário do veículo de tração: //A informação do tipo de transportador (tpTransp) não deverá ser preenchida. Obrig. 745 Rej
If &MdfeVeiProTip <> PropriedadeVeiculo.Proprio // se Proprietario for cpf seta TAC se nao deixa o que o cliente selecionou //Se modal rodoviário e informado proprietário ou possuidor do veículo de tração (CNPJ/CPF) //este deve ser diferente do emitente do MDF-e Obrig, 740 Rej.
//Se modal rodoviário e informado proprietário ou possuidor do veículo de tração (CNPJ/CPF), //o grupo contratante deverá ser informado com apenas uma ocorrência (infContratante) //indicando o CNPJ/CPF do emitente do MDF-e Obrig. 741 Rej
MdfeConCnpj = FilCpj MdfeConRaz = FilRaz
If &soNumero.Trim().Length() = 11 // 743 Rej MDFeTipTra = Mdfe_TipoTransporte.TAC EndIf EndIF
If &MdfeVeiProTip <> PropriedadeVeiculo.Proprio // 745 Rej &Xml.WriteElement('tpTransp',trim(MDFeTipTra)) EndIf &Xml.WriteElement('mod',trim(MDFeModCod))// <mod>58</mod> &Xml.WriteElement('serie',trim(str(MDFeSer)))// <serie>1</serie> &Xml.WriteElement('nMDF',trim(str(MDFeNum)))// <nMDF>2</nMDF> &Xml.WriteElement('cMDF',&cMDF)// <cMDF>49128302</cMDF> &Xml.WriteElement('cDV',trim(&DV))//<cDV>6</cDV> &Xml.WriteElement('modal',trim(MDFeTipMod))// <modal>1</modal>
&soNumero = str(year(MDFeDtaEms),4,0) +'-'+padl(trim(str(month(MDFeDtaEms),2,0)),2,'0') +'-'+padl(trim(str(day(MDFeDtaEms),2,0)),2,'0') +'T'+trim(MDFeHorEms)+'-'+ trim(FilFusHor) // <dhEmi>2012-10-01T15:03:29</dhEmi> &Xml.WriteElement('dhEmi',trim(&soNumero))
&Xml.WriteElement('tpEmis',trim(&tpEmis))// <tpEmis>1</tpEmis> &Xml.WriteElement('procEmi','0')// <procEmi>0</procEmi>0 - emissão de MDF-e com aplicativo do contribuinte; &Xml.WriteElement('verProc', &VersaoNF)// <verProc>DLL_MDFe.Util v_1.00</verProc> &Xml.WriteElement('UFIni',trim(MDFeOriUfeCod))// <UFIni>SP</UFIni> &Xml.WriteElement('UFFim',trim(MDFeDstUfeCod))// <UFFim>RS</UFFim> &MDFeDstUfeCod = MDFeDstUfeCod &MDFeDesCidCod = MDFeDesCidCod do 'GetNomeCidade'
//CARREGAMENTO For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, MDFeCarCod &Xml.WriteStartElement('infMunCarrega')// <infMunCarrega> &CidCod = MDFeCarCidCod do 'getCidade' &Xml.WriteElement('cMunCarrega',trim(str(&CidIBGE)))// <cMunCarrega>3550308</cMunCarrega> &Xml.WriteElement('xMunCarrega', trim(&CidNom))// <xMunCarrega>Sao Paulo</xMunCarrega> &Xml.WriteEndElement() // </infMunCarrega> EndFor If MdfeIndCarregaPosterior = Status_SimNao.Sim &Xml.WriteElement('indCarregaPosterior','1') EndIf
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, (MDFePerCod) &UltimoCodigoMDFePerCod = MDFePerCod Exit Endfor
//PERCURSO &isPrimeira = true For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, MDFePerCod Do Case Case &isPrimeira = true and MDFePerUfeCod = MDFeOriUfeCod &isPrimeira = false Case &UltimoCodigoMDFePerCod = MDFePerCod and MDFePerUfeCod = MDFeDstUfeCod Otherwise &Xml.WriteStartElement('infPercurso')// <infPercurso> &Xml.WriteElement('UFPer', trim(MDFePerUfeCod))// <UFPer>PR</UFPer> &Xml.WriteEndElement()// </infPercurso> EndCase EndFor &Xml.WriteEndElement() //</ide>
&Xml.WriteStartElement('emit')//<emit> &soNumero = udp(RetornaSoNumeros,FilCpj) If &soNumero.Trim().Length() > 11 &Xml.WriteElement('CNPJ', trim(&soNumero))// <CNPJ>10142785000190</CNPJ> Else &Xml.WriteElement('CPF', trim(&soNumero)) EndIf
&soNumero = udp(RetornaSoNumeros, FilInsEst) &Xml.WriteElement('IE', trim(&soNumero))// <IE>495171423115</IE> &Xml.WriteElement('xNome', trim(FilRaz))// <xNome>MRM KATO ASAKURA EPP</xNome> &Xml.WriteElement('xFant', trim(FilFan))// <xFant>FlexDocs Documentos Eletronicos</xFant> &Xml.WriteStartElement('enderEmit')// <enderEmit> &Xml.WriteElement('xLgr', trim(FilLog))// <xLgr>Avenida Doutor Altino Arantes</xLgr> &Xml.WriteElement('nro', trim(FilNro))// <nro>131</nro>
// If not Fil.IsEmpty() // &Xml.WriteElement('xCpl', &FilCliCpl)// <xCpl>14 andar - sala 145</xCpl> // EndIF
&Xml.WriteElement('xBairro', trim(FilBai))// <xBairro>Centro</xBairro> &Xml.WriteElement('cMun', trim(str(FilCidUfeIbge)))// <cMun>3534708</cMun> &Xml.WriteElement('xMun', trim(FilCidNom))// <xMun>Ourinhos</xMun> &soNumero = udp(RetornaSoNumeros, FilCep) &Xml.WriteElement('CEP', trim(&soNumero))// <CEP>19900030</CEP> &Xml.WriteElement('UF', trim(FilCidUfeCod))// <UF>SP</UF> if not FilFonNum.IsEmpty() &soNumero = udp(RetornaSoNumeros, FilFonNum) &Xml.WriteElement('fone', &soNumero)// <fone>1433022000</fone> EndIF
If not FilEml.IsEmpty() &Xml.WriteElement('email', trim(FilEml))// <email>contato@flexdocs.com.br</email> EndIf
&Xml.WriteEndElement()// </enderEmit> &Xml.WriteEndElement()// </emit>
&Xml.WriteStartElement('infModal')// <infModal versaoModal="1.00"> &Xml.WriteAttribute('versaoModal', trim(&VersaoNF)) &Xml.WriteStartElement('rodo')// <rodo> &Xml.WriteStartElement('infANTT') If not MDFeRNTRC.IsEmpty() and not MDFeRNTRC.IsNull() and MDFeTipTra <> MDFe_TipoTransporte.TAC &Xml.WriteElement('RNTRC',trim(MDFeRNTRC))// <RNTRC>22334455</RNTRC> EndIF
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, MdfeCiotCod If not MDFeCIOT.IsEmpty() and not MDFeCIOT.IsNull() &Xml.WriteStartElement('infCIOT') &Xml.WriteElement('CIOT', substr(trim(RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(MDFeCIOT)),1,12))// <CIOT>111222333444</CIOT> If not MDFeCIOTCnpj.Trim().IsEmpty() &MDFeCIOTCnpj = RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(MDFeCIOTCnpj) If &MDFeCIOTCnpj.Length() > 11 &Xml.WriteElement('CNPJ',&MDFeCIOTCnpj) Else &Xml.WriteElement('CPF',&MDFeCIOTCnpj) EndIf EndIf &Xml.WriteEndElement()// </infCIOT> EndIF EndFor
//Informações de Vale Pedagio If MdfePosVale = Status_SimNao.Sim &Xml.WriteStartElement('valePed') &Xml.WriteStartElement('disp') For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod,MDFeCod,MdfePedCod &Xml.WriteElement('CNPJForn', trim(udp(RetornaSoNumeros, MdfePedCnpjFor))) &MdfePedResPag = udp(RetornaSoNumeros, MdfePedResPag) If &MdfePedResPag.Length() > 11 &Xml.WriteElement('CNPJPg', trim(&MdfePedResPag)) Else &Xml.WriteElement('CPFPg', trim(&MdfePedResPag)) EndIf
&Xml.WriteElement('nCompra', trim(MdfePedNroCom)) &Xml.WriteElement('vValePed',MdfePedVlr) If not MdfePedTip.IsEmpty() &Xml.WriteElement('tpValePed',MdfePedTip) EndIf EndFor &Xml.WriteEndElement()// </disp> &Xml.WriteElement('categCombVeic',MdfeCatComVei) &Xml.WriteEndElement()// </valePed> EndIf
If not MdfeConCnpj.Trim().IsEmpty() &MdfeConCnpj = retornasoNumeros.Udp(MdfeConCnpj) &Xml.WriteStartElement('infContratante') &Xml.WriteElement('xNome', trim(RetiraCaracteresEspeciais.Udp(MdfeConRaz)))
If &MdfeConCnpj.Length() > 11 &Xml.WriteElement('CNPJ', trim(&MdfeConCnpj)) Else &Xml.WriteElement('CPF', trim(&MdfeConCnpj)) EndIf &Xml.WriteEndElement()// </infContratante EndIf
If MDFePgtFrt = Status_SimNao.Sim &Xml.WriteStartElement('infPag') // <infPag>
If MDFeTomFrt = 1 &MdfeConCnpj = retornasoNumeros.Udp(MdfeConCnpj) &Xml.WriteElement('xNome', trim(RetiraCaracteresEspeciais.Udp(MdfeConRaz))) Do Case Case &MdfeConCnpj.Trim().Length() <=11 &Xml.WriteElement('CPF',&MdfeConCnpj) Case &MdfeConCnpj.Trim().Length() <=14 &Xml.WriteElement('CNPJ',&MdfeConCnpj) OtherWise &Xml.WriteElement('idEstrangeiro',&MdfeConCnpj) EndCase Else &MdfeConCnpj = retornasoNumeros.Udp(MdfeInfPagFrtCnpj) &Xml.WriteElement('xNome', trim(RetiraCaracteresEspeciais.Udp(MdfeInfPagFrtRaz))) Do Case Case &MdfeConCnpj.Trim().Length() <=11 &Xml.WriteElement('CPF',&MdfeConCnpj) Case &MdfeConCnpj.Trim().Length() <=14 &Xml.WriteElement('CNPJ',&MdfeConCnpj) OtherWise &Xml.WriteElement('idEstrangeiro',&MdfeConCnpj) EndCase EndIf
For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod,MDFeCod,MdfePgtFrtCod &Xml.WriteStartElement('Comp') // <Comp> &Xml.WriteElement('tpComp',MdfePgtFrtTip) &Xml.WriteElement('vComp',MdfePgtFrtVlr) If not MdfePgtFrtDes.Trim().IsEmpty() and MdfePgtFrtTip = TipoPagamentoFrete.Outros &Xml.WriteElement('xComp',retiraCaracteresEspeciais.Udp(MdfePgtFrtDes)) EndIf &Xml.WriteEndElement() // </Comp EndFor
&Xml.WriteElement('vContrato',MdfePgtFrtTot) &Xml.WriteElement('indPag',MdfePgtFrtForPgt)
If MdfePgtFrtForPgt = 1 //prazo &MdfePgtParNro = 0 For Each Order EmpCod,FilCod,MDFeCod,MdfePgtParNro &MdfePgtParNro +=1 &Xml.WriteStartElement('infPrazo') // <infPrazo> &Xml.WriteElement('nParcela',Padl(str(&MdfePgtParNro),3,'0')) &soNumero = str(year(MdfePgtParVct),4,0) +'-'+padl(trim(str(month(MdfePgtParVct),2,0)),2,'0') +'-'+padl(trim(str(day(MdfePgtParVct),2,0)),2,'0') &Xml.WriteElement('dVenc',&soNumero) &Xml.WriteElement('vParcela',MdfePgtParVlr) &Xml.WriteEndElement() // </infPrazo EndFor EndIf &Xml.WriteStartElement('infBanc') // <infBanc>
If not MdfePgtFrtBanCnpj.Trim().IsEmpty() &Xml.WriteElement('CNPJIPEF',MdfePgtFrtBanCnpj) Else If not MdfePgtFrtChvPix.Trim().IsEmpty() &Xml.WriteElement('PIX',MdfePgtFrtChvPix) Else &Xml.WriteElement('codBanco',MdfePgtFrtBanCod) &Xml.WriteElement('codAgencia',MdfePgtFrtBanAge) EndIf EndIf
&Xml.WriteEndElement() // </infBanc
&Xml.WriteEndElement() // </infPag EndIf
&Xml.WriteEndElement()// </infANTT
//VEICULO For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeVeiCod &Xml.WriteStartElement('veicTracao')// <veicPrincipal> //&Xml.WriteElement('cInt', trim(&soNumero))// <cInt>3010</cInt> &Xml.WriteElement('placa', trim(UPPER(StrReplace(MDFeVeiPla, "-", ""))))// <placa>BBB1111</placa> If not MDFeVeiRen.trim().IsEmpty() and MDFeVeiRen.Trim().Length() >= 8 &Xml.WriteElement('RENAVAM', Substr(trim(MDFeVeiRen),1,11))//7 RENAVAM 2 RENAVAM do veículo E C 0 - 1 9 - 11 ER33 EndIF
&Xml.WriteElement('tara', trim(toformattedString(MDFeVeiTar)))// <tara>15000</tara> &Xml.WriteElement('capKG', trim(toformattedString(MDFeVeiCap)))//9 capKG 2 Capacidade em KG E N 0 - 1 1 - 6 ER53 &Xml.WriteElement('capM3', trim(toformattedString(MDFeVeiCapM3)))//10 capM3 2 Capacidade em M3 E N 0 - 1 1 - 3 ER30
If MdfeVeiProTip <> PropriedadeVeiculo.Proprio and (not MDFeVeiProCnpj.IsEmpty() and not MDFeVeiProCnpj.IsNull()) &Xml.WriteStartElement('prop') // <prop>
&soNumero = udp(RetornaSoNumeros, MDFeVeiProCnpj) If &soNumero.Trim().Length() > 11 &Xml.WriteElement('CNPJ', trim(&soNumero)) Else &Xml.WriteElement('CPF', trim(&soNumero)) EndIf
&Xml.WriteElement('RNTRC', trim(MDFeVeiRNTRC)) // <f>12344321</RNTRC> &Xml.WriteElement('xNome', trim(MDFeVeiProRaz)) &Xml.WriteElement('IE', trim(MDFeVeiProIe)) &Xml.WriteElement('UF', trim(MDFeVeiProUf)) &Xml.WriteElement('tpProp', trim(MdfeVeiProTip)) &Xml.WriteEndElement()// </prop> EndIF
//MOTORISTA For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, MDFeMotCod &Xml.WriteStartElement('condutor')// <condutor> &Xml.WriteElement('xNome', trim(MDFeMotNom))// <xNome>Fulano de Tal motorista</xNome> &soNumero = udp(RetornaSoNumeros, MDFeMotCpf) &Xml.WriteElement('CPF', trim(&soNumero))// <CPF>11111111111</CPF> &Xml.WriteEndElement()// </condutor> EndFor
&Xml.WriteElement('tpRod', PadL(MDFeVeiTipRod, 2, '0'))//22 tpRod 2 Tipo de Rodado E N 1 - 1 2 D12 Preencher com: //01 - Truck; //02 - Toco; //03 - Cavalo Mecânico; //04 - VAN; //05 - Utilitário; //06 - Outros. &Xml.WriteElement('tpCar', PadL(MDFeVeiTipCar, 2, '0'))//23 tpCar 2 Tipo de Carroceria E N 1 - 1 2 D13 Preencher com: //00 - não aplicável; //01 - Aberta; //02 - Fechada/Baú; //03 - Granelera; //04 - Porta Container; //05 - Sider &Xml.WriteElement('UF', trim(MDFeVeiUF))//24 UF 2 UF em que veículo está licenciado E C 1 - 1 2 D4 Sigla da UF de licenciamento do veículo &Xml.WriteEndElement()// </veicPrincipal> EndFor
//REBOQUE For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, MDFeRebCod
&Xml.WriteStartElement('veicReboque')// <veicReboque> &Xml.WriteElement('cInt', trim(MDFeRebCod))// <cInt>3011</cInt> &Xml.WriteElement('placa', trim(UPPER(StrReplace(MDFeRebPla, "-", ""))))// <placa>ABC1000</placa> If not MDfeRebRen.IsEmpty() &Xml.WriteElement('RENAVAM', SubStr(trim(MDfeRebRen),1,11))//28 RENAVAM 2 RENAVAM do veículo E C 0 - 1 9 - 11 ER33 EndIF &Xml.WriteElement('tara', trim(toformattedString(MDFeRebTar)))// <tara>30000</tara> &Xml.WriteElement('capKG', trim(toformattedString(MDFeRebCap)))// <capKG>20000</capKG> // &Xml.WriteElement('capM3', trim(toformattedString(MDFeRebCapM3)))// <capM3>60</capM3>
if not MdfeRebProTip <> PropriedadeVeiculo.Proprio and not MDFeRebProCnpj.Trim().IsEmpty() &Xml.WriteStartElement('prop')// <prop> &soNumero = udp(RetornaSoNumeros, MDFeRebProCnpj) If &soNumero.Trim().Length() > 11 &Xml.WriteElement('CNPJ', trim(&soNumero)) Else &Xml.WriteElement('CPF', trim(&soNumero)) EndIf
&Xml.WriteElement('RNTRC', trim(MDFeRebRNTRC))// <f>12344321</RNTRC> &Xml.WriteElement('xNome', trim(MDFeRebProRaz)) &Xml.WriteElement('IE', trim(MDFeRebProIe)) &Xml.WriteElement('UF', trim(MDFeRebProUf)) &Xml.WriteElement('tpProp', trim(MdfeRebProTip)) &Xml.WriteEndElement()// </prop> EndIF
&Xml.WriteElement('tpCar', padL(MDFeRebTipCar, 2, '0'))//tpCar 2 Tipo de Carroceria E N 1 - 1 2 D13 Preencher com: //00 - não aplicável; //01 - Aberta; //02 - Fechada/Baú; //03 - Granelera; //04 - Porta Container; //05 – Sider &Xml.WriteElement('UF', trim(MDFeRebUF))//41 UF 2 UF em que veículo está licenciado E C 1 - 1 2 D4 Sigla da UF de licenciamento do veículo.
&Xml.WriteEndElement()// </veicReboque> EndFor &Xml.WriteEndElement()// </rodo> &Xml.WriteEndElement()// </infModal>
&Xml.WriteStartElement('infDoc')// <infDoc> If MDFeTipEmt = Mdfe_TipoEmitente.NaoPrestador //################################################ NFE ################################### For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod//, MDfeNfeCidCod Where MdfeNfeUfeCod <> &MDFeDstUfeCod or MDfeNfeCidCod = &MDfeDesCidIbge
&Xml.WriteStartElement('infMunDescarga')// <infMunDescarga> &Xml.WriteElement('cMunDescarga', trim(str(&MDfeDesCidIbge)))// <cMunDescarga>4318002</cMunDescarga> &Xml.WriteElement('xMunDescarga', trim(&MDFeDesCidNom))// <xMunDescarga>Sao Borja</xMunDescarga>
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, MDfeNfeCidCod, MDFeNFeItm Where MdfeNfeUfeCod <> &MDFeDstUfeCod or MDfeNfeCidCod = &MDfeDesCidIbge
&Xml.WriteStartElement('infNFe')// <infNFe> &Xml.WriteElement('chNFe', trim(MDFeNfeChv))// <chNFe>35120910142785000190552340000000011131229000</chNFe> If not MDFeNfeChv2.Trim().IsEmpty() &Xml.WriteElement('SegCodBarra', trim(MDFeNfeChv2)) EndIf &Xml.WriteEndElement()// </infNFe> EndFor &Xml.WriteEndElement()// </infMunDescarga> When none If MdfeIndCarregaPosterior = Status_SimNao.Sim &Xml.WriteStartElement('infMunDescarga')// <infMunDescarga> &Xml.WriteElement('cMunDescarga', trim(str(&MDfeDesCidIbge)))// <cMunDescarga>4318002</cMunDescarga> &Xml.WriteElement('xMunDescarga', trim(&MDFeDesCidNom))// <xMunDescarga>Sao Borja</xMunDescarga> &Xml.WriteEndElement()// </infMunDescarga> EndIf EndFor
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, MDfeNfeCidCod Where MdfeNfeUfeCod = &MDFeDstUfeCod and MDfeNfeCidCod <> &MDfeDesCidIbge
&Xml.WriteStartElement('infMunDescarga')// <infMunDescarga> &Xml.WriteElement('cMunDescarga', trim(str(MDfeNfeCidCod)))// <cMunDescarga>4318002</cMunDescarga> &Xml.WriteElement('xMunDescarga', trim(MDFeNfeCidNom))// <xMunDescarga>Sao Borja</xMunDescarga>
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, MDfeNfeCidCod, MDFeNFeItm Where MdfeNfeUfeCod = &MDFeDstUfeCod and MDfeNfeCidCod <> &MDfeDesCidIbge
&Xml.WriteStartElement('infNFe')// <infNFe> &Xml.WriteElement('chNFe', trim(MDFeNfeChv))// <chNFe>35120910142785000190552340000000011131229000</chNFe> If not MDFeNfeChv2.Trim().IsEmpty() &Xml.WriteElement('SegCodBarra', trim(MDFeNfeChv2)) EndIf &Xml.WriteEndElement()// </infNFe> EndFor &Xml.WriteEndElement()// </infMunDescarga> EndFor
Else //################################################ CTE #################################################################### For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod//, MDfeNfeCidCod Where MdfeCteUfeCod <> &MDFeDstUfeCod or MDfeCteCidCod = &MDfeDesCidIbge
&Xml.WriteStartElement('infMunDescarga')// <infMunDescarga> &Xml.WriteElement('cMunDescarga', trim(str(&MDfeDesCidIbge)))// <cMunDescarga>4318002</cMunDescarga> &Xml.WriteElement('xMunDescarga', trim(&MDFeDesCidNom))// <xMunDescarga>Sao Borja</xMunDescarga>
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, MDfeCteCidCod, MDFeCteItm Where MdfeCteUfeCod <> &MDFeDstUfeCod or MDfeCteCidCod = &MDfeDesCidIbge
&Xml.WriteStartElement('infCTe')// <infCTe> &Xml.WriteElement('chCTe', trim(MDFeCteChv))// <chCte>35120910142785000190552340000000011131229000</chCte> If not MDFeCteChv2.Trim().IsEmpty() &Xml.WriteElement('SegCodBarra', trim(MDFeCteChv2)) EndIf &Xml.WriteEndElement()// </infCte> EndFor &Xml.WriteEndElement()// </infMunDescarga> EndFor
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, MDfeCteCidCod Where MdfeCteUfeCod = &MDFeDstUfeCod and MDfeCteCidCod <> &MDfeDesCidIbge
&Xml.WriteStartElement('infMunDescarga')// <infMunDescarga> &Xml.WriteElement('cMunDescarga', trim(str(MDfeCteCidCod)))// <cMunDescarga>4318002</cMunDescarga> &Xml.WriteElement('xMunDescarga', trim(MDFeCteCidNom))// <xMunDescarga>Sao Borja</xMunDescarga>
For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, MDfeCteCidCod, MDFeCteItm Where MdfeCteUfeCod = &MDFeDstUfeCod and MDfeCteCidCod <> &MDfeDesCidIbge
&Xml.WriteStartElement('infCTe')// <infCTe> &Xml.WriteElement('chCTe', trim(MDFeCteChv))// <chCTe>35120910142785000190552340000000011131229000</chCTe> If not MDFeCteChv2.Trim().IsEmpty() &Xml.WriteElement('SegCodBarra', trim(MDFeCteChv2)) EndIf &Xml.WriteEndElement()// </infCTe> EndFor &Xml.WriteEndElement()// </infMunDescarga> EndFor EndIf
&Xml.WriteEndElement()// </infDoc>
//############################## Seguro ############################################ If MDFeTipEmt <> MDFe_TipoEmitente.NaoPrestador &Xml.WriteStartElement('seg')// <seg> For each Order EmpCod,FilCod,MDFeCod,MdfeSegCod
&Xml.WriteStartElement('infResp') &Xml.WriteElement('respSeg', trim(MdfeSegRes)) If not MdfeSegResCnpj.Trim().IsEmpty() &MdfeSegResCnpj = RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(MdfeSegResCnpj) If &MdfeSegResCnpj.Length() > 12 &Xml.WriteElement('CNPJ', trim(&MdfeSegResCnpj)) Else &Xml.WriteElement('CPF', trim(&MdfeSegResCnpj)) EndIf Else &Xml.WriteElement('CNPJ', '00000000000000') EndIf &Xml.WriteEndElement()// </infResp>
If not MdfeSegNom.Trim().Isempty() &Xml.WriteStartElement('infSeg') If Not MdfeSegNom.Trim().IsEmpty() &Xml.WriteElement('xSeg', trim(MdfeSegNom)) Else &Xml.WriteElement('xSeg','') EndIf
&MdfeSegCnpj = RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(MdfeSegCnpj) If Not &MdfeSegCnpj.Trim().IsEmpty() &Xml.WriteElement('CNPJ', trim(&MdfeSegCnpj)) Else &Xml.WriteElement('CNPJ', '00000000000000') EndIf
&Xml.WriteEndElement()// </infSeg> EndIf If not MdfeSegNroApo.Trim().IsEmpty() &Xml.WriteElement('nApol', trim(MdfeSegNroApo)) Else &Xml.WriteElement('nApol','000000000000000') EndIf &isAverba = false For each Order EmpCod,FilCod,MDFeCod,MdfeSegCod,MdfeSegNroAve If not MdfeSegNroAve.Trim().isEmpty() &Xml.WriteElement('nAver', trim(MdfeSegNroAve)) &isAverba = True EndIf EndFor If &isAverba = false &Xml.WriteElement('nAver','000000000000000') EndIf EndFor
&Xml.WriteEndElement()// </seg> EndIf
//################################## PRODUTO PREDOMINANTE ############################### If MDFeTipEmt = Mdfe_TipoEmitente.Prestador OR MDFeTipEmt = Mdfe_TipoEmitente.Globalizado or &MdfeVeiProTip <> PropriedadeVeiculo.Proprio &Xml.WriteStartElement('prodPred')// <prodPred> &Xml.WriteElement('tpCarga',MDFeTipCar)
&Xml.WriteElement('xProd',trim(retiraCaracteresEspeciais.Udp(MDFeProPre))) If not MDFeProPreNcm.IsEmpty() &Xml.WriteElement('NCM',PadL(trim(str(MDFeProPreNcm)), 8, '0')) EndIf
//################################## LOTACAO ############################################
If (MDFeTotCTe) = 1 or (MDFeTipEmt = Mdfe_TipoEmitente.NaoPrestador and (MDFeTotNF) = 1 and &MdfeVeiProTip <> PropriedadeVeiculo.Proprio) // 726 Rej. &Xml.WriteStartElement('infLotacao') // <infLotacao> &Xml.WriteStartElement('infLocalCarrega') // <infLocalCarrega> &Xml.WriteElement('CEP',RETORNASoNumeros.Udp(MDFeLotCarCep)) &Xml.WriteEndElement()// </infLocalCarrega>
&Xml.WriteStartElement('infLocalDescarrega')// <infLocalDescarrega> &Xml.WriteElement('CEP',RETORNASoNumeros.Udp(MDFeLotDesCep)) &Xml.WriteEndElement()// </infLocalDescarrega>
&Xml.WriteEndElement()// </infLotacao> EndIf
&Xml.WriteEndElement()// </prodPred> EndIf
&Xml.WriteStartElement('tot')// <tot> If MDFeTotCTe > 0 &Xml.WriteElement('qCTe', trim(toformattedString(MDFeTotCTe)))// <qCTe>8</qCTe> EndIf If MDFeTotNF > 0 &Xml.WriteElement('qNFe', trim(toformattedString(MDFeTotNF)))// <qNFe>8</qNFe> EndIf &NovoValorQuatroCasas = MDFeVlrTot &soNumero = trim(toformattedString(&NovoValorQuatroCasas)) &soNumero = &soNumero.Replace(',','.') &Xml.WriteElement('vCarga', &soNumero.Trim())// <vCarga>15000.00</vCarga> &Xml.WriteElement('cUnid', PadL(MDfeUnd, 2, '0'))// <cUnid>01</cUnid>
&NovaQuantidade = MDFePsoBrt &soNumero = trim(toformattedString(&NovaQuantidade)) &soNumero = &soNumero.Replace(',','.') &Xml.WriteElement('qCarga', &soNumero.Trim())// <qCarga>12300</qCarga> &Xml.WriteEndElement()// </tot>
// For Each Order MDFSeq, MdfLacSeq // &Xml.WriteStartElement('lacres')// <lacres> // &Xml.WriteElement('nLacre', trim(MdfNumLac))// <nLacre>AKUX10019KX</nLacre> // &Xml.WriteEndElement()// </lacres> // EndFor
If Not FilCtaCnpj.Trim().IsEmpty() and FilCtaCnpj <> &FilCpj //and FilCtaCnpj <> CteRemCnpj and FilCtaCnpj <> CteDesCnpj
&FilCtaCnpj = RetornaSoNumeros.Udp(FilCtaCnpj) &xml.WriteStartElement('autXML') If &FilCtaCnpj.Length() > 11 &xml.WriteElement('CNPJ',&FilCtaCnpj) Else &xml.WriteElement('CPF',&FilCtaCnpj) EndIf &xml.WriteEndElement()//autXML EndIf
For each order FilAutXml &xml.WriteStartElement('autXML') &FilAutXml = retornaSoNumeros.Udp(FilAutXml) If &FilAutXml.Length() > 11 &xml.WriteElement('CNPJ',&FilAutXml) else &xml.WriteElement('CPF',&FilAutXml) EndIf &xml.WriteEndElement()//autXML EndFor
If not MDFeAdc.IsEmpty() and not MDFeAdc.IsNull() &Xml.WriteStartElement('infAdic')// <infAdic>
&TotLin = GxMlines(MDFeAdc, 100) &NumLin = 1 Do While &NumLin <= &TotLin &MDFeAdc = &MDFeAdc.Trim() + ' ' + GxGetMLi(MDFeAdc, &NumLin, 100) &NumLin += 1 EndDo &Xml.WriteElement('infCpl', &MDFeAdc.Trim())//<infCpl>Informacoes de Adicionais do Fisco. Operacao nao tributada.</infAdFisco>
&Xml.WriteEndElement()// </infAdic> EndIF
ResponsavelTecnico.Call(&MDfeChv, &EmpCnpj,&EmpRaz,&EmpEml,&EmpFon, &idCSRT, &hashCSRT) &Xml.WriteStartElement('infRespTec') &Xml.WriteElement('CNPJ',trim(&EmpCnpj)) &Xml.WriteElement('xContato',trim(&EmpRaz)) &Xml.WriteElement('email',trim(&EmpEml)) &Xml.WriteElement('fone',trim(&EmpFon)) // &Xml.WriteElement('idCSRT',trim(&idCSRT)) // &Xml.WriteElement('hashCSRT',trim(&hashCSRT)) &Xml.WriteEndElement()//infRespTec
&Xml.WriteEndElement() //Fecha infMDFe
If &tpEmis = Nf_TipoEmissao.Normal /// se for em contingencia o uninfe vai gerar automatico &Xml.WriteStartElement('infMDFeSupl')
&qrCodMDFe = 'https://dfe-portal.svrs.rs.gov.br/mdfe/qrCode?chMDFe='+&MDfeChv+'&tpAmb='+&tpAmb //1ª parte: URL - https://dfe-portal.svrs.rs.gov.br/mdfe/qrCode? //2ª parte : parâmetros - chMDFe=43181207312871000190580010000334041421310776&tpAmb=1 //3ª parte: assinatura - &sign=ZZSKiypy7fkg22MUv6TUh71EI+wLYWr/fUHJy3PyWnL7d5mzEqtxu6bVbhE7AeNiDTirh1u9gVfC2Hw+Lsno2XNL5FRUc5NcuMTT2hA6E9HYC9gryvtWAIgiCZUNG5cWWLCh0G62QdnNe8iSrlSooQu9Z5g1vbGaTFMxaugzzvo= //3ª parte: sign assinatura digital no padrão RSA SHA-1 (Base64) &Xml.WriteElement('qrCodMDFe',&qrCodMDFe) &Xml.WriteEndElement() EndIf
&Xml.WriteEndElement() //Fecha MDFe &Xml.Close() Exit EndFor
commit
RetornaExisteSolicitacaoPendente.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &MDFeCod, 0, TipoSolicitacao.Autorizar_MDFe, &IsPendente, &SolCod) if &SolCod.IsEmpty() GravaSolicitacao.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &MDFeCod, 0, TipoSolicitacao.Autorizar_MDFe, &PesCod, &SolCod) Endif
sub 'getCidade' &CidIBGE= 0 &CidNom = '' For Each Order EmpCod, CidCod Where EmpCod = &EmPCod Where CidCod = &CidCod &CidIBGE = CidIBGE &CidNom = CidNom Exit EndFor EndSub
sub 'GetNomeCidade' For Each Order EmpCod, CidCod Where EmpCod = &EmPCod Where CidCod = &MDFeDesCidCod &MDFeDesCidNom = CidNom &MDfeDesCidIbge = CidIBGE Exit EndFor EndSUb
